channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: SpaceX veut lancer une offre mobile Starlink pour concurrencer les opérateurs
item.description: SpaceX aurait déclaré à ses investisseurs vouloir lancer une offre mobile Starlink grand public aux États-Unis. De quoi attaquer frontalement Verizon, AT&T et T-Mobile sur leur propre terrain.

item.title: Ford rehires ‘gray beard’ engineers after AI falls short
item.description: "Mistakenly we thought that by just introducing artificial intelligence ... that would produce a high-quality product.”

item.title: The Ninja AutoBarista Pro accommodates two totally different coffee-drinkers — and I wish all coffee machines made life this easy
item.description: The Ninja AutoBarista Pro comes with two swappable coffee bean hoppers and lets you set up two different brew profiles for each beverage.

item.title: 5 easy ways to get more range out of your EV
item.description: These little tricks will help you spend more time driving instead of charging.

item.title: Megapod is the modular AI data center kit that Elon Musk's Tesla wants to sell — but there's a tiny problem (actually, three)
item.description: Tesla's proposed Megapod AI data center project faces significant hurdles before it even begins – trademark conflicts, established competition and more.

item.title: Prompt injection is exploiting enterprise AI's biggest design flaws by targeting agents, RAG pipelines and model routers
item.description: In the past two years, businesses have been trying to fit large language models (LLMs) into support, analytics, development, and internal automation like never before. Along with the increasing adoption of AI technology, another trend is gaining momentum — cybercriminals are taking advantage of the disconnect between assumptions about LLMs and their actual characteristics.In 2025 and 2026, several independent sources have highlighted the same trend: Prompt injection remains one of the most impactful and widely demonstrated attack vectors against LLM systems. The OWASP LLM Top 10 (2025) lists p...

item.title: This app turned me into the music creator that GarageBand never could
item.description: Homescreen Heroes: BandLab is a free music-making app for recording vocals, making beats, and mixing demos

item.title: The Persona 6 teaser already has me feeling hopeful about the series' future — here's why
item.description: Persona 6 looks as if it's heading in a darker, more mature direction, and that in itself is a positive first step — here's why.
